OpenHardwareMonitorLib.dll in this package comes from:
https://www.nuget.org/packages/OpenHardwareMonitorLib/1.0.9513

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/HardwareMonitor/openhardwaremonitor

winmon does not modify this library.

Upstream README notes:
- some sensors may require administrator privileges

See MPL-2.0.txt in the same directory for the bundled license text.
